S.FORM: Zelmo Beaty sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1939, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 10, Zelmo Beaty, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2013) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: zelmo Œ≤eatj s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj **, zelmo Œ≤eatj, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. (mƒßuqil s~…ïa kawas~…ï taj ****) ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
